---
name: Feature request
about: Idea for something Loadout doesn't do yet.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem you're trying to solve**
What's missing or painful right now?

**What you'd like Loadout to do**
Concrete behavior — chat command, overlay event, settings toggle, etc.

**Why this fits Loadout (vs. a one-off SB action)**
What makes this a kit-level feature?

**Tier this fits**
Free / Plus (T2) / Pro (T3) — your read.

**Anything else**
Mockups, similar features in other tools, willingness to PR it, etc.
